description_en: Create a traditional Chinese style table lamp with a base, stem, and shade. The lamp should have intricate carvings and be adorned with red and gold accents.

components.name: base
components.description: The base of the lamp, which supports the stem and shade.

components.name: stem
components.description: The stem connects the base to the shade and provides support.

components.name: shade
components.description: The shade covers the light source and diffuses the light.

style_notes: The base should have intricate carvings and be adorned with red and gold accents. The stem should be plain or have subtle carvings. The shade should have a traditional Chinese pattern and be adorned with red and gold accents. The joinery should be tight and precise, with no visible gaps.
